judgment.summary: Zscaler shows strong revenue growth and positive free cash flow, but operates at a loss and has a high forward P/E ratio.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 12.6%; next earnings date is 2026-05-26.
positives: Revenue growth 25.9% YoY indicates strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow of $1.02B TTM demonstrates healthy cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'strong buy' with a mean target of $223.39.
negatives: Operating margin of -6.2% and profit margin of -2.3% indicate unprofitability.
Forward P/E of 38.08x is high, suggesting aggressive growth expectations.
Return on equity of -3.6% and return on assets of -1.4% are negative.
Debt/Equity ratio of 85.00% indicates significant leverage.

news.paragraph: US software stocks are seeing a rebound, with Zscaler's price action potentially influenced by broader sector trends as investors re-evaluate the dominance of AI-focused companies. The market is seeking to loosen AI's grip, suggesting a potential shift in investor focus towards other software segments. Traders should monitor if this sector-wide movement provides a catalyst for ZS or if company-specific factors will dictate its performance.

headlines.title: US software stocks rebound, seeking to loosen AI's grip
